patterns.reminder: Private key material in a tracked file. Remove it and rotate the key; secrets live only in environment configuration or provider dashboards (CLAUDE.md section 7).
Anthropic API key detected. Remove it and rotate; keys belong in the cloud environment env-var screen or CI secrets, never in code.
GitHub token detected. Remove it and rotate; use the GitHub App integration or CI secrets instead.
AWS access key ID detected. Remove it and rotate; cloud credentials never live in tracked files.
Hardcoded secret-shaped assignment. Load this value from environment configuration; if it is a real credential, rotate it.
Database URL with embedded credentials. Use env vars for connection strings; if this is a real credential, rotate it. Production connection strings must never appear anywhere agents can read.
Piping a download into a shell is prohibited (CLAUDE.md section 7). Download, inspect, then execute.
Reading .env files is prohibited for agents (secrets boundary, CLAUDE.md section 7).
Setting ASSERTION_SHIELD_BYPASS is prohibited for agents; restore the deleted assertions instead (CLAUDE.md section 7).
